entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum L.(R.) Br., the crop studied for genetic divergence

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in genetic characteristics among the 190 pearl millet accessions

entities.name: MAINTAINER LINE
entities.description: B lines used in the genetic diversity analysis

entities.name: RESTORER LINE
entities.description: R lines used in the genetic diversity analysis

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used for genetic analysis

entities.name: SSR PRIMERS
entities.description: Primers used for screening SSR markers, with 34 being polymorphic

entities.name: PIC VALUE
entities.description: Polymorphism Information Content value used to assess marker informativeness

entities.name: AMOVA
entities.description: Analysis of Molecular Variance used to analyze variance within and between groups

entities.name: NEIGHBOR JOINING TREE
entities.description: A phylogenetic tree method used to cluster B and R lines based on dissimilarity

entities.name: DISSIMILARITY MATRIX
entities.description: A matrix of genetic distances used to construct the neighbor joining tree

entities.name: GENETIC DISSIMILARITY
entities.description: Estimates of genetic distance between specific pearl millet lines

entities.name: HETEROSIS BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding strategy utilizing divergent parents to achieve hybrid vigor

relationships.description: is the subject of the study on
